items.title_en: Trump administration's limits on student loan forgiveness program are blocked. What to know
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府对学生贷款减免计划的限制被阻止。要知道什么
items.desc_en: Trump's policy that narrowed eligibility for a popular student loan forgiveness program will not go into effect, after two federal judges blocked the rule.
items.desc_zh: 在两名联邦法官阻止该规则后，特朗普缩小受欢迎的学生贷款减免计划资格的政策将不会生效。

items.title_en: GM reports 4.2% decline in Q2 U.S. sales as EV demand falls
items.title_zh: 通用汽车报告称，由于电动汽车需求下降，第二季度美国销量下降 4.2%
items.desc_en: General Motors' second-quarter U.S. sales fell 4.2% as year-over-year demand for its all-electric vehicles and Chevrolet Silverado pickup trucks declined.
items.desc_zh: 通用汽车第二季度美国销量下降 4.2%，原因是其全电动汽车和雪佛兰索罗德皮卡车的需求同比下降。

items.title_en: Man guilty of attempted murder of three children in Dublin
items.title_zh: 都柏林男子企图谋杀三名儿童
items.desc_en: Riad Bouchaker denied attempting to murder three children and assaulting four other people on 23 November 2023.
items.desc_zh: Riad Bouchaker 否认于 2023 年 11 月 23 日企图谋杀三名儿童并袭击另外四人。

items.title_en: Trump filing shows he took in about $1.2 billion from crypto businesses last year - AP News
items.title_zh: 特朗普提交的文件显示，他去年从加密货币业务中获得了约 12 亿美元 - 美联社新闻
items.desc_en: Trump filing shows he took in about $1.2 billion from crypto businesses last year  AP NewsTrump’s financial disclosure lists $1.4 billion in crypto earnings, powered largely by meme coins  NBC NewsTru
items.desc_zh: 特朗普提交的文件显示，他去年从加密业务中获得了约 12 亿美元美联社新闻特朗普的财务披露列出了 14 亿美元的加密货币收入，主要由 meme 硬币推动 NBC NewsTru

items.title_en: Trump says outside funds 'run my money' after disclosure shows billions in 2025 revenue
items.title_zh: 披露2025年收入数十亿美元后，特朗普表示外部资金“跑了我的钱”
items.desc_en: The 927-page annual financial disclosure form shows Trump's purchases and sales of hundreds of companies' stocks, including Nvidia, Amazon and Microsoft.
items.desc_zh: 这份长达927页的年度财务披露表格显示了特朗普购买和出售数百家公司股票的情况，其中包括英伟达、亚马逊和微软。

items.title_en: Retrofitted Qatari jet takes flight as Air Force One for Trump's trip to North Dakota
items.title_zh: 改装后的卡塔尔喷气式飞机作为空军一号飞往特朗普的北达科他州之行
items.desc_en: The refurbished Boeing 747 with luxury features, worth $400 million, was gifted by Qatar, something that raised ethical concerns.
items.desc_zh: 卡塔尔赠送的价值 4 亿美元的翻新波音 747 具有豪华功能，这引发了道德担忧。

items.title_en: Badenoch accuses Starmer of leaving defence spending 'mess' for Burnham - BBC

items.title_en: Meta pops 8% as company makes cloud push to sell excess AI compute power capacity
items.title_zh: 随着公司推动云计算以出售多余的人工智能计算能力，Meta 上涨 8%
items.desc_en: The new business is a welcome signal for some investors who have been uneasy about the company's infrastructure spending plans.
items.desc_zh: 对于一些对该公司基础设施支出计划感到不安的投资者来说，这项新业务是一个受欢迎的信号。

items.title_en: Palantir's Karp bashes OpenAI, Anthropic token model: 'Something has gone completely wrong'
items.title_zh: Palantir 的 Karp 猛烈抨击 OpenAI、Anthropic 代币模型：“有些事情完全错了”
items.desc_en: Karp says skyrocketing token costs are forcing companies to choose open weight models and prioritize efficiency over so-called tokenmaxxing
items.desc_zh: 卡普表示，飙升的代币成本迫使公司选择开放权重模型，并优先考虑效率而不是所谓的代币最大化

items.title_en: EBay doesn't need Ryan Cohen for its comeback. How to profit from the turnaround

items.desc_zh: 张托尼 (Tony Zhang) 详细介绍了他如何利用期权来实现 eBay 的东山再起。

items.desc_zh: 这家火箭和卫星通信制造商的股价首先飙升，然后回落至 6 月份的 135 美元首发价。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止新游戏的实体光盘生产
items.desc_en: PlayStation will end physical disc production for new games in 2028, the company announced Wednesday morning.
items.desc_zh: 该公司周三上午宣布，PlayStation 将在 2028 年停止新游戏的实体光盘生产。

items.title_en: Canada will take part in Eurovision Song Contest 2027
items.title_zh: 加拿大将参加 2027 年欧洲歌唱大赛
items.desc_en: The country becomes the first new participant since Australia joined the contest in 2015.
items.desc_zh: 该国成为自澳大利亚2015年加入该竞赛以来第一个新参赛者。

items.title_en: U.S. auto industry faces more uncertainty without extension of USMCA trade deal
items.title_zh: 如果不延长USMCA贸易协议，美国汽车业将面临更多不确定性
items.desc_en: A major issue for automakers is the deal's rules of origin, which determine where a product comes from and which goods are eligible for preferential treatment.
items.desc_zh: 汽车制造商面临的一个主要问题是该协议的原产地规则，它决定了产品的来源以及哪些商品有资格获得优惠待遇。

items.title_en: Sudan's RSF committed crimes against humanity in el-Fasher, Amnesty says
items.title_zh: 国际特赦组织称，苏丹快速支援部队在法希尔犯下反人类罪
items.desc_en: The Amnesty report adds to evidence of atrocities in el-Fasher, which the UN says bore the hallmarks of genocide.
items.desc_zh: 国际特赦组织的报告增加了法希尔暴行的证据，联合国称该地区具有种族灭绝的特征。

items.title_en: Employers who laid off workers citing AI are already starting to regret it
items.title_zh: 以人工智能为由解雇员工的雇主已经开始后悔
items.desc_en: Companies are realizing artificial intelligence can't do everything after all, prompting them to rehire employees to grow their businesses
items.desc_zh: 公司意识到人工智能毕竟不能做所有事情，促使他们重新雇用员工来发展业务

items.title_zh: 特朗普上任第一年就从加密货币中赚取了超过 10 亿美元

items.desc_zh: 总统从房地产、特朗普主题的圣经、手表和其他物品中赚取了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
items.title_zh: Anthropic 称美国取消对其先进人工智能工具的出口禁令
items.desc_en: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.
items.desc_zh: 由于担心黑客可能利用《寓言》和《神话》，它们在 6 月份突然被暂停。

items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，阿富汗塔利班对与巴基斯坦边境发动袭击

items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦军方表示，他们击落了四架简陋的无人机，并将对任何进一步的挑衅做出回应。

items.title_zh: 一架飞机撞上北京的一座塔楼，但中国没有透露发生了什么

items.desc_zh: 碰撞在塔的一侧留下了洞，但北京已经清除了该事件的其他明显痕迹。

items.desc_zh: 危险的热浪将在假日周末之前袭击美国  BBC 破纪录的热浪预计将在 7 月 4 日周末之前袭击纽约市  纽约时报 7 月 4 日可能是有史以来最热的一天

items.title_en: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震六天后，三岁儿童获救并送往医院
items.desc_en: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.
items.desc_zh: 视频片段显示，当孩子从拉瓜伊拉州的废墟中被救出时，救援人员欢呼雀跃。

items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_en: 'Absolute madness': Row over plan to demolish Nazi bunker under Berlin
items.title_zh: “绝对疯狂”：拆除柏林地下纳粹掩体的计划引发争议
items.desc_en: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
items.desc_zh: 市政府官员希望在市中心建造公寓，但其他人则表示，它应该作为德国历史的一部分予以保留。

items.title_en: Firefighters struggle to contain deadly Greek wildfire
items.title_zh: 消防员努力控制致命的希腊野火
items.desc_en: Over 100 firefighters are working to extinguish a fire near Thessaloniki which has claimed a life.
items.desc_zh: 超过 100 名消防员正在努力扑灭塞萨洛尼基附近的一场大火，这场大火已造成人员伤亡。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.desc_en: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title_en: Roof collapse kills 14 schoolchildren in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦屋顶倒塌造成14名学童死亡
items.desc_en: Two people are taken into custody after the incident at a tuition centre in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.desc_zh: 事件发生后，拉合尔卡纳郊区的一个补习中心有两人被拘留。

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
